info.title: Oracle Health Millennium FHIR R4 APIs Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Oracle Health Millennium publishes broad FHIR R4 and EHR REST APIs for patient, appointment, device, observation, document, medication, coverage, communication, and bulk clinical-data workflows across the Millennium platform.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Oracle Health Millennium FHIR R4 APIs. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Oracle Health documents Millennium Platform APIs across FHIR R4, EHR REST, SMART authorization, and bulk data access. The public endpoint catalogs show create, read, update, patch, delete, and export operations for resources such as Patient, Appointment, Device, Observation, DiagnosticReport, DocumentReference, Encounter, Coverage, Communication, MedicationRequest, Practitioner, Schedule, Slot, and QuestionnaireResponse, plus EHR-specific allergies, patient messages, code values, locations, personnel, and recipient workflows. Oracle also documents asynchronous bulk exports for Group and Patient data in its FHIR R4 bulk-data surface. This is a broad write-capable clinical interoperability API, but it does not represent asset or telemetry data. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

externalDocs.description: Vendor documentation used as the primary public source for this manufactured contract.
